data.title: Ethereum erases 50% value post-Trump markets
data.description:
According to the Global Capital Markets analysis team, the Kobeissi Letter, Ethereum (ETH) has shed almost 50% of its value since the end-2024 bull market run that began when President Donald Trump won the US elections. The global crypto market is also down 30% from its 3-month high of $3.895 trillion, according to Coingecko. This […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-erases-50-value-post-trump-markets/

data.title: Crypto Bloodbath: Bitcoin and Ether Plunge on Tariff Uncertainty
data.description:
TL;DR Market Plunge: Bitcoin and Ether drop below key levels, $80K and $2,100 as tariff uncertainty shakes investor confidence. Tariff Tension: U.S. tariff hikes on imports stoke fears of trade wars, potentially driving inflation and economic slowdowns. Liquidation Wave: Hedge fund sell-offs trigger over $1.34B in crypto liquidations, dragging down overall market cap by 7.25%. ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/crypto-bloodbath-bitcoin-and-ether-plunge-on-tariff-uncertainty/

data.title: The SEC changes approach: ends lawsuits against Consensys and Coinbase
data.description:
Under the Trump administration, the SEC is adopting a new strategy in its relations with the digital asset industry.
The post The SEC changes approach: ends lawsuits against Consensys and Coinbase appeared first on Atlas21.
source: https://atlas21.com/the-sec-changes-approach-ends-lawsuits-against-consensys-and-coinbase/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=the-sec-changes-approach-ends-lawsuits-against-consensys-and-coinbase

data.title: Su Zhu: Now may be a good time to buy short-term call options on BTC and ETH
data.description: Su Zhu wrote on X: “Now may be a good time to buy short-term call options on BTC and ETH.”

data.title: Football star Ronaldinho: Will release "big news" about cryptocurrencies, beware of fake meme coins with the same name
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Former Brazilian football player Ronaldinho Gaucho posted on the X platform: "Please pay attention to the fake Meme coins named after me. Remember, I have not yet launched any official tokens. To the entire cryptocurrency community, please stay tuned because we will release major news here soon."

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Rules Out Interest Rate Hike
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 28, Federal Reserve official Hamark stated that there is no consideration for an interest rate hike in the current outlook. Inflation expectations remain stable.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 80,000 USDT with a Narrowed 7.29% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 28, 2025, 10:48 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 80,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 80,143.351563 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 7.29% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin proposes social recovery for wallets to erase losses from technical mistakes
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin reiterated that crypto still needed reliable wallets with social recovery tools. Currently, several products exist, using smart contracts to unlock funds if the seed phrase is lost.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/vitalik-buterin-proposes-social-recovery/

data.title: Vanar Chain partners up with Worldpay to promote Web3 payment innovation
data.description:
Vanar Chain, the Layer-1 (L1) blockchain, has announced a new strategic partnership with Worldpay, a payments technology company, as reported … Continue reading

data.title: Deribit executives: Current options market data predicts that the probability of BTC price exceeding $90,000 by the end of March is 23.4%
data.description: Lin Chen, head of Asia Pacific business at Deribit, said in a post on the X platform: “The current options market data predicts that the probability of BTC price exceeding $90,000 by the end of March is 23.4%; the probability of exceeding it by the end of the year is 56.13%.”
